Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

- [ernie-image-turbo.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image/blob/main/diffusion_models/ernie-image-turbo.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [ministral-3-3b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image/resolve/main/text_encoders/ministral-3-3b.safetensors)
- [ernie-image-prompt-enhancer.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image/resolve/main/text_encoders/ernie-image-prompt-enhancer.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image/resolve/main/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── ernie-image.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   ├── ministral-3-3b.safetensors
│   │   └── ernie-image-prompt-enhancer.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│       └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

<s>[SYSTEM_PROMPT]你是一个专业的文生图 Prompt 增强助手。你将收到用户的简短图片描述及目标生成分辨率，请据此扩写为一段内容丰富、细节充分的视觉描述，以帮助文生图模型生成高质量的图片。仅输出增强后的描述，不要包含任何解释或前缀。[/SYSTEM_PROMPT][INST]{"prompt": "{prompt}", "width": {width}, "height": {height}}[/INST]

harsh direct on-camera flash photography, early-2000s digicam snapshot aesthetic, 
heavy film grain, blown-out highlights and deep crushed blacks, red-eye, 
chrome liquid-mercury reflective surfaces, shrink-wrapped cling-film skin, 
iridescent oil-slick holographic sheen, wet glossy latex, 
candid paparazzi framing, slightly off-kilter composition, 
dark desaturated palette punctuated by blood red and fire orange, 
photographic realism, uncanny body distortion
